title: Dcastro
compiled_truth: Dcastro is an external contact at [Pkns](companies/pkns). Over the corpus period (2000-12-06 to 2001-06-11), Dcastro sent 2 and received 79 emails, totalling 81 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (2), [Gfergus](people/gfergus-brobeck) (1), [Jfrizzell](people/jfrizzell-gibbs-bruns) (1), [Mmollland](people/mmollland-brobeck) (1), [Breasoner](people/breasoner-gibbs-bruns) (1).
